assertions: transcript.md shows a test written and run to a failing (RED) state before retry_operation existed
the test exercises real retry behavior (e.g. a function that fails N times then succeeds) rather than only asserting a mock's call_count
a test covers the exhaustion case (fails all 3 attempts, exception propagates/re-raises)
final test suite run passes with zero failures
implementation has no unrequested parameters (e.g. backoff strategy, max_retries, on_retry callback) beyond the literal 3-retry requirement
